MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF MARK CARTON'S DEMURRER TO ANSWER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED; insufficient service. Plaintiff personally served the moving papers. The declaration of service states that the server is "not a party to this action," but the declaration is signed by the Plaintiff. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
